title: Squirrel Removal in Jericho, NY | $900–$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Jericho, Long Island. Humane trapping, exclusion, and attic cleanup. Licensed experts serving Jericho homes and businesses. Call now!
intro: Squirrels can cause significant damage to Jericho homes by chewing through roof soffits, nesting in attics, and damaging insulation and wiring. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Jericho, from the estates near the Jericho Preserve to residential neighborhoods along Jericho Turnpike. Our humane removal process includes trapping, exclusion, sanitization, and preventative measures to keep your property squirrel-free.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of wildlife control experience to Jericho homeowners, combining humane trapping methods with permanent exclusion solutions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Long Island squirrel infestations and provide same-day emergency service with comprehensive warranties on all exclusion work.
localContext: Jericho's mature tree canopy and mix of mid-century ranch homes and newer construction create ideal conditions for squirrel activity, especially in neighborhoods near the Jericho Preserve and along wooded sections of Merry Lane. The area's well-established properties often feature older roof lines and attic vents that squirrels exploit for nesting, particularly during fall and spring breeding seasons.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Jericho typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of attic damage. This includes humane trapping, complete exclusion work sealing all entry points, sanitization, and insulation repair if needed.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Jericho attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the attic during early morning or evening hours, visible entry holes near roof lines or soffits, chewed wood or wiring, droppings in the attic, and squirrels seen repeatedly entering or exiting the same spot on your roof. Jericho homeowners often notice increased activity during spring and fall breeding seasons.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in Jericho?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, wildlife-approved trapping and exclusion methods in compliance with New York State regulations. We use live traps and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter, then relocate them according to local guidelines and permanently seal all entry points to prevent future infestations.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to squirrel problems in Jericho?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Jericho and surrounding Long Island communities. Most inspections can be scheduled within 24 hours, and we begin trapping and exclusion work immediately upon assessment. Complete removal typically takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels and complexity of entry points.
